steps.title: Use the triangle angle sum
steps.content:
The angles in a triangle sum to $180^\circ$. With angle $P=38^\circ$ and angle $Q=90^\circ$, write the equation.
$$38^\circ+90^\circ+R=180^\circ$$

steps.title: Solve for angle R
steps.content:
Combine the known angles, then subtract from $180^\circ$.
$$128^\circ+R=180^\circ$$
$$R=52^\circ$$
The answer is B.
